title: elaeocarpus arfakensis
intro: Elaeocarpus arfakensis, also known as the Mt. Arfak orfis tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus arfakensis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting against oxidative stress, which can help prevent chronic diseases such as heart disease, diabetes, and cancer. Herbal preparations of Elaeocarpus arfakensis are typically made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
